purpose: Primary control system for compressor operation, managing loading/unloading cycles, pressure regulation, and protection functions

inputs.name: loading_pressure
inputs.description: Pressure setpoint at which compressor starts loading

inputs.name: unloading_pressure
inputs.description: Pressure setpoint at which compressor starts unloading

inputs.name: pressure_regulation_range
inputs.description: Allowable pressure variation range for regulation

inputs.name: minimum_stop_time
inputs.description: Minimum time compressor must remain stopped between cycles

states.name: electronic_components_condition
states.description: Electronic component degradation due to operating hours and thermal cycling

states.name: motor_load_factor
states.description: Tracked motor load factor relative to rated capacity

states.name: fan_motor_load_factor
states.description: Tracked fan motor load factor relative to rated capacity

states.name: service_hours_accumulator
states.description: Accumulated service hours for maintenance tracking

events.name: compressor_element_overtemperature
events.description: Compressor element outlet temperature exceeds programmed shut-down level

events.name: temperature_warning
events.description: Compressor element outlet temperature exceeds programmed warning level

events.name: service_warning
events.description: Service limits exceeded for monitored components

parameters.name: electronic_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for electronic component degradation

parameters.name: electronic_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Base degradation rate for electronic components

parameters.name: temperature_tracking_coefficient
parameters.description: First-order lag coefficient for temperature tracking

parameters.name: motor_load_tracking_coefficient
parameters.description: First-order lag coefficient for motor load tracking

parameters.name: fan_load_tracking_coefficient
parameters.description: First-order lag coefficient for fan load tracking

parameters.name: base_loading_duration
parameters.description: Base loading duration at full health

parameters.name: base_unloading_duration
parameters.description: Base unloading duration at full health

parameters.name: motor_overload_threshold
parameters.description: Motor load threshold for overload protection

parameters.name: fan_overload_threshold
parameters.description: Fan motor load threshold for overload protection

parameters.name: service_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Service hours threshold for maintenance warning

parameters.name: sensor_fault_threshold
parameters.description: Electronic condition threshold for sensor fault

state_transition_logic: electronic_components_condition decreases by (1.0 / electronic_degradation_timescale) * electronic_degradation_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
compressor_outlet_temperature approaches temperature_target using first-order lag with coefficient min(temperature_tracking_coefficient, 0.5), clamped to [20.0, 150.0]
motor_load_factor approaches motor_load_target using first-order lag with coefficient min(motor_load_tracking_coefficient, 0.5), clamped to [0.0, 1.5]
fan_motor_load_factor approaches fan_load_target using first-order lag with coefficient min(fan_load_tracking_coefficient, 0.5), clamped to [0.0, 1.5]
service_hours_accumulator increases by service_hours_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 50000.0]
output_logic: loading_duration = base_loading_duration / electronic_components_condition, adjusted by pressure_regulation_range
unloading_duration = base_unloading_duration / electronic_components_condition, adjusted by pressure_regulation_range
compressor_load_state determined by pressure comparison between loading_pressure and unloading_pressure
automatic_operation_active = true when electronic_components_condition > 0.5, false otherwise
assumptions: Electronic component degradation follows exponential decay with constant degradation rate
Temperature and motor loads follow first-order lag dynamics toward target values
Service hours accumulate linearly during operation
Pressure regulation performance degrades proportionally with electronic component condition
Automatic operation becomes unreliable below 50% electronic component condition
All sensors and protection systems depend on electronic component health
